item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Cell Phone Data Restore Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Restore Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Restore Software
(Internet Apps)
Data recovery Tool restores lost data. Cell Phone Data Restore Software recovers lost or deleted digital images. Cell Phone Data Restore Software has fully capable to regain missing or deleted files from formatted or damaged mobile phone memory in very few mouse clicks. Cell Phone Data Restore Software provides advanced disk scanning mechanism techniques to search and recover deleted, corrupted or formatted files/folder from mobile phone memory. Mobile Phone Data Recovery Application regains deleted audio and video files from corrupted memory of cell phone devices.

[read more]

item.title: Photo Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photo Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Photo Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Are you still finding out solution to restore lost photographs from damaged computer peripheral storage devices? Just install Windows operating system supported Photo Recovery Software that helps user to restore misplaced digital pictures, snaps, wallpapers etc from computer internal and external mass storage devices. Powerful photo restoration program provides an affordable procedure to regain accidently erased snaps from digital cameras at low price cost.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Mac OS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Mac OS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Mac OS
(Internet Apps)
Card Recovery Mac tool regain damaged clips. Memory Card Recovery Mac software helps in regaining erased movie and films. Professional Memory Card Recovery Mac software downloaded from url www.photo-engineering.com helps in secure retrieval of corrupted multimedia files and folders from smart media storage devices in few seconds. Innovative Memory Card Recovery Mac program available at url www.photo-engineering.com provides standard solution to rescue corrupted audio, video, images, pictures, photos, files and folders lost due to improper handling of devices in few simple steps.

[read more]

item.itunes:title: Downloads Photo Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Downloads Photo Recovery
(Utilities)
Wallpaper recovery tool used to restore all importance file, screenshots, snapshots, images, picture, photos, from user zip drive that was formatted due to human mistake, power failure, hardware problem etc within few mouse clicks. Downloads Photo Recovery software on www.photo-engineering.com and save crashed picture, images from your flash drive.

[read more]

item.title: Recover SMS Messages [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Recover SMS Messages [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Recover SMS Messages
(Internet Apps)
Free utility for lost SIM card data recovery. SIM card data recapture tool rescue all your corrupted data from SIM card memory. SIM card data retrieval software recovers all accidentally deleted phonebook directory, unreadable text messages from your SIM card memory. SIM card data reader tool also recovers service provider name, location, IMSI, ICC-ID identification number. SIM card data recovery program restores contact names, numbers and SMS of inbox outbox, sent items with date, time and sender number from corrupted or virus infected SIM card of mobile phone. SIM card data restoration software displays erased ICC identification number, service provider name with area location and IMSI number using PC/SC or phoenix standard SIM card reader device and provides the option to take a print out of the information.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover SMS Messages
(Internet Apps)
Free utility for lost SIM card data recovery. SIM card data recapture tool rescue all your corrupted data from SIM card memory. SIM card data retrieval software recovers all accidentally deleted phonebook directory, unreadable text messages from your SIM card memory. SIM card data reader tool also recovers service provider name, location, IMSI, ICC-ID identification number. SIM card data recovery program restores contact names, numbers and SMS of inbox outbox, sent items with date, time and sender number from corrupted or virus infected SIM card of mobile phone. SIM card data restoration software displays erased ICC identification number, service provider name with area location and IMSI number using PC/SC or phoenix standard SIM card reader device and provides the option to take a print out of the information.

item.title: Photo Recovery Softwares [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photo Recovery Softwares [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Photo Recovery Softwares
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Softwares is capable to retrieve deleted snapshots which lost due to software or hardware malfunction from different types of storage media including memory stick, pen drive, jump drive, thumb drive, zip drive etc and no need of any technical expert guidance or training. Visit company www.photo-engineering.com site to recover lost picture lost by human mistake from windows based mobile phones.

[read more]

item.title: appimage to menu [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: appimage to menu [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
appimage to menu
(Utilities)
claudemods-appimagetomenu v1.0
this converts appimages and places them in the applications directory
you will need pyqt6 from your package manager
28/07/24

step 1
simply extract .zip

step2
make the .sh executable and execute the run.sh
select a appimage and let the application do the rest
your appimage will be in your start menu

all have been tested and converted apps work fine

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧

https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]

item.title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: kushagrakarira
item.itunes:summary:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]
item.description:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:

(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]

item.title: Desktop Magic [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Desktop Magic [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Desktop Magic
(Utilities)
A simple tool which can create snow, flowers, bubble,... effect on your PC.
Some features:
-Can create many types of effect.
-Can modify speed, number, direction.
-Can run on scheduled time.
-Can play music.
[read more]
